content:
# Pore Throat Size

**Summary**: The size of the narrowest part of a pore, which controls fluid flow.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-suleiman|Suleiman, 2022]] used to establish relationship with NMR data and predict permeability.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-suleiman|Suleiman, 2022]] Determines capillary pressure and saturation height profiles.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2022-suleiman|Suleiman, 2022]] Measured via MICP analysis of core samples.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The prediction model for pore throat size achieved 0.985 CC, 0.97 R2, and 0.016 RMSE. ([[2022-suleiman|Suleiman, 2022, p. 17]])
